entries.name: claude-events
entries.description: Event vocabulary for the claude-wrapper harness.

entries.name: claude-tui
entries.description: Terminal UI: rounded prompt box + status bar. Provides ui:channel.

entries.name: claude-driver
entries.description: Session driver: spawns claude CLI, streams output, emits llm.* status items.

entries.name: llm-events
entries.description: Event vocabulary and shared types for openai-compatible harnesses.

entries.name: llm-tui
entries.description: Generic LLM-chat TUI primitives: input, output, status bar, completion popup, theme.

entries.name: llm-tools-registry
entries.description: Central tool registry and single tool-execution chokepoint for the openai-compatible harness.

entries.name: llm-local-tools
entries.description: Built-in local-development toolset (read/write/create/edit/glob/grep/bash) for the openai-compatible harness. NOT sandboxed.

entries.name: llm-native-dispatch
entries.description: Native OpenAI tool-calling dispatch strategy (alternate to code-mode).

entries.name: llm-codemode-dispatch
entries.description: Code-mode tool dispatch: LLM writes TypeScript calling kaizen.tools.* in a Bun Worker sandbox. Default dispatch strategy for local LLMs.

entries.name: llm-driver
entries.description: Turn loop and conversation state. Provides `driver:run-conversation`.

entries.name: claude-wrapper
entries.description: Claude Code wrapper: distinctive prompt + extensible status bar over `claude -p`.

entries.name: openai-compatible
entries.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM harness: chat against any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, etc.).
